report_name.description: What is the name of the bundle you want to create?

dev_host.description: What is the host of the DEV environment?

stg_host.description: What is the host of the STG environment? (use the same host as the DEV environment)

prd_host.description: What is the host of the PRD environment?

prd_group.description: Which group should be granted 'Manage' permissions for Databricks jobs in the PRD environment?

prd_sp_name.description: What is the name (i.e. app ID) of the Service Principal in the PRD environment?

prd_notification_email.description: Email for job failure notifications in the PRD environment.
